overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character exploring a snowy mountain landscape at night. The character walks past large woolly rhinoceros creatures while traversing snow-covered terrain with pine trees and distant mountains under an aurora-lit sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily uphill through snow, passing a large horned creature on the left

large dark woolly creature with curved horn resting in snow

snow-covered ground with patches of grass

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a snowy mountain landscape at night, passing a large woolly rhinoceros resting on the left. Snow-covered pine trees line the left hillside while distant mountains rise against a green aurora-lit sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field with distant forest

agents.ego_description: jogging through open snow field toward distant forest and mountains

entered.detail: dense line of snow-covered pine trees on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Having passed the first creature, the character traverses an open snow field with the pine trees now closer on the left. A distant forest line becomes visible on the horizon as the character continues toward the mountains.

events.description: second great-horned rhinoceros comes into view on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a second large horned creature grazing in the snow

notable_agents.action: great-horned rhinoceros grazing in the snow

entered.detail: second large woolly rhino with curved horn feeding in snow

segments.scene_description: A second great-horned rhinoceros appears on the right side of the field, grazing in the snow. The character walks past this creature as it continues feeding, with the snowy pine forest still visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field approaching mountain forest

agents.ego_description: continuing through open snow field toward distant mountains and tree line

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the open snow field after passing the second rhinoceros. The distant forest shifts to the left as the character advances toward the mountain range under the starry green sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a frozen mountain wilderness that transitions from a sheltered hillside into an expansive, open snow field. It begins with the character walking past a resting woolly rhinoceros on the left, flanked by snow-covered pine trees under a green aurora-lit sky. As the character moves forward, the hillside gives way to a wide expanse of snow where the pine trees draw closer on the left and a distant forest line emerges on the horizon. The scene then shifts as a second great-horned rhinoceros appears on the right, grazing peacefully while the character passes by. Finally, the camera advances further into the open field, leaving the creatures behind as the distant forest shifts to the left and the mountain range looms larger under the starry green sky.
